name: Warm Barley-Vegetable Salad
recipeIngredient: 1/4 teaspoon Crushed red pepper flakes, or to taste
4 cups Coarsely chopped zucchini or summer squash (~1 1/4 lbs)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet or wok, combine the onion and 2 tablespoons of vegetable broth or water.
2. Add dried thyme and crushed red pepper flakes (or to taste).
3. Cook over medium-high heat for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the onion is tender and just begins to brown.
4. Add the remaining vegetable broth or water, zucchini or summer squash, and barley; cover.
5. Cook for about 5 minutes, or until squash is tender-crisp.
6. Stir in chopped tomatoes, cilantro, fresh lime juice, and salt.
7. Thoroughly combine all ingredients.
8. Serve immediately or re-cover and refrigerate. Bring almost to room temperature before serving.
NOTE: Patty pan, also known as white bush or scallop squash, can be used instead of zucchini or summer squash.
